description: General home-systems cluster monitoring dashboard. Shared surface — add panels here rather than spinning up single-purpose dashboards. First panels: pods stuck not-ready (from the 2026-07-05 hermes RWX incident).
title: Monitoring

panels.title: Pods not ready (Pending/Unknown, non-Job)
panels.description: Count of pods stuck Pending/Unknown. Backing signal for the KubePodNotReady alert. Requires kube-state-metrics.

targets.expr:
count(
  sum by (namespace, pod) (
    max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Unknown"})
    * on (namespace, pod) group_left(owner_kind)
    max by (namespace, pod, owner_kind) (kube_pod_owner{owner_kind!="Job"})
  ) > 0
) or vector(0)

panels.title: Not-ready pods (namespace / pod)
panels.description: Pods currently Pending/Unknown, excluding Jobs. Requires kube-state-metrics.

targets.expr:
sum by (namespace, pod, phase) (
  max by (namespace, pod, phase) (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Unknown"})
  * on (namespace, pod) group_left(owner_kind)
  max by (namespace, pod, owner_kind) (kube_pod_owner{owner_kind!="Job"})
) > 0
